sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36088" key="e)nstakte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνστακτέον</orth>, <sense id="n36088.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must instil,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg005:120" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.120</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
